raw_consumer_statement:
I am writing to formally raise a complaint regarding serious billing and service issues on my Citi credit card account ending in XXXX. This account was opened several years ago and closed years ago. However, in XXXX, I encountered unexpected and erroneous activity on this closed account. 

Timeline of Events : [ XXXX, XXXX ] : I noticed a payment was made to my closed Citi credit card account. I immediately contacted Citi customer service and was informed that the payment was made by mistake. I was assured the issue would be fixed. 

[ XXXX, XXXX ] : I received a call confirming that my account balance was {$0.00} and that the issue had been resolved. 

XX/XX/XXXX : I unexpectedly received an email from Citi stating that I owed a balance of {$3900.00}, and monthly payments were due. 

I contacted Citi again and spoke to a supervisor, who explained that when the earlier correction was made, Citi accidentally reversed the adjustment twice, creating the erroneous balance. He said a request was submitted to fix the issue within 7 days. 

XX/XX/XXXX : Despite this assurance, I received another billing statement ( Billing period XX/XX/XXXX XX/XX/XXXX ) indicating I had missed a payment and now owed {$190.00} in interest and charges. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, I called Citi again and spoke with Supervisor XXXX, who stated he would escalate the issue to the head office and personally call me back on XX/XX/XXXX, at XXXXXXXX XXXX Unfortunately, I did not receive any follow-up call. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, I called again and spoke with Supervisor XXXX, who was extremely unprofessional and rude. When I asked for a guarantee that the issue would be resolved, he responded that if I did not believe him, he would cancel the request and that I could go ahead and file a complaint with the consumer bureau. 

My Concerns : A closed credit card account should not be receiving payments, reversals, or accruing balances. 

I have been given contradictory information multiple times, and no effective resolution has been made. 

The poor and unprofessional conduct of Supervisor XXXX is unacceptable for a customer service representative. 

These errors and delays are causing unwarranted stress and risk of negative credit reporting.
